SAKURAMOD-WIND.title: Wind
SAKURAMOD-WATER.title: Water
SAKURAMOD-WATER.description: Talisman effect: deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-FIRE.title: Fire
SAKURAMOD-FIRE.description: Talisman effect: deal 6 damage to a random enemy.
SAKURAMOD-EARTH.title: Earth
SAKURAMOD-STABILIZE.title: Stabilize
SAKURAMOD-STABILIZE.description: Remove [red]Temporary[/red] from 1 card in your hand or discard pile. The first Transparent Card Stabilized each combat is added to card rewards.
SAKURAMOD-CATALOG.title: Catalog
SAKURAMOD-CATALOG.description: The different Transparent Card types you have played this combat.
SAKURAMOD-MANIFEST.title: Manifest
SAKURAMOD-MANIFEST.description: Choose 1 of the revealed random Transparent Cards to put into your hand as a [red]Temporary[/red] copy.
SAKURAMOD-BURN.title: Burn
SAKURAMOD-BURN.description: After receiving attack damage from a Fire card, lose HP equal to Burn.
SAKURAMOD-LONER.title: Loner
SAKURAMOD-LONER.description: For each missing copy of this card in your deck, its value increases by 20%.
